name: maui-inspections
description: Synthetic inspection points at real Maui parks, trailheads, and harbors. Demo data only — no real inspections are represented.

properties.name: Waiheʻe Ridge Trailhead
properties.note: Boardwalk sections dry, signage intact. Demo data — synthetic inspection.
